name: DeckBoss
description: We're not another "agent framework." We're the flight deck that launches, recovers, and coordinates other people's planes—whether that's Claude's native agents, Cloudflare edge agents, or future ManusAI/Ollama agents. The "boss" is the system that manages the chaos without being in the cockpit.

name: deckboss-1
description: Deckboss.ai — AI assistant for edge robotics and IoT. Clone onto Jetson/RPi, onboard, start building systems. Hand off to Cocapn.

name: deckboss-ai
description: Deckboss Ecosystem — Fleet hub, vessel registry, and system design tools. Part of the Lucineer agent platform.

name: deckboss-fab
description: CAD/CAM equipment for deckboss — OpenSCAD, FreeCAD, Gazebo, G-code generation

name: deckboss-hardware
description: Deckboss.net — Preloaded hardware units for the Cocapn ecosystem. Jetson, RPi, accessories. Ship ready.

name: deckboss-marketplace
description: Vendor marketplace for deckboss ecosystem — 3D printers, CNC, parts, tiered fees

name: deckboss
description: Deckboss.ai — AI assistant for edge robotics and IoT. Clone onto Jetson/RPi, onboard, start building systems. Hand off to Cocapn.
